biological_replicate: anaerobic sediment from a hypersaline soda lake
technical_replicate: inoculated with 1 cm3 of 1:1 sediment-brine suspension
experimental_design: An anaerobic enrichment with CO from sediments of hypersaline soda lakes resulted in a methane‐forming binary culture...
factor_value: It is an extreme haloalkaliphilic and moderate thermophilic acetogen utilizing CO, formate, pyruvate and lactate as electron donors...
